## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor (no functional changes)
- [ ] Test improvement
- [ ] CI/CD improvement

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the [Development Guidelines](docs/DEVELOPMENT_GUIDELINES.md)
- [ ] Type hints added/updated on all public functions
- [ ] `ruff check` passes
- [ ] `ruff format` applied
- [ ] `mypy` passes
- [ ] Tests added for new functionality
- [ ] All tests pass (`pytest`)
- [ ] Changelog entry added (if user-visible change)
- [ ] Documentation updated (if API or behavior changed)
- [ ] No new third-party runtime dependencies (unless approved)
